text:
(a) Except as provided by Subsections (b) and (c), each fee collected under this subchapter shall be deposited to the credit of the Texas mobility fund.

(b) Subsection (a) does not apply to the portion of a fee collected under Section 521.421 (License Fees; Examination Fees) (b) or Section 521.421 (License Fees; Examination Fees) (f) that is required by Section 662.011 (Motorcycle Education Fund Account) to be deposited to the credit of the motorcycle education fund account.

(c) Repealed by Acts 2003, 78th Leg., 3rd C.S., ch. 8, Sec. 6.02.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 521. Driver's Licenses & Certificates
##### § 521.427 — Disposition of Fees

(a) Except as provided by Subsections (b) and (c), each fee collected under this subchapter shall be deposited to the credit of the Texas mobility fund.

(b) Subsection (a) does not apply to the portion of a fee collected under Section 521.421 (License Fees; Examination Fees) (b) or Section 521.421 (License Fees; Examination Fees) (f) that is required by Section 662.011 (Motorcycle Education Fund Account) to be deposited to the credit of the motorcycle education fund account.

(c) Repealed by Acts 2003, 78th Leg., 3rd C.S., ch. 8, Sec. 6.02.

*Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 614 (H.B.3798), Sec. 3, eff. September 1, 2023.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: Except as provided by Subsections (b) and (c), each fee collected under this subchapter shall be deposited to the credit of the Texas mobility fund.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: Subsection (a) does not apply to the portion of a fee collected under Section 521.421 (License Fees; Examination Fees) (b) or Section 521.421 (License Fees; Examination Fees) (f) that is required by Section 662.011 (Motorcycle Education Fund Account) to be deposited to the credit of the motorcycle education fund account.

subsections.label: c
subsections.text: Repealed by Acts 2003, 78th Leg., 3rd C.S., ch. 8, Sec. 6.02.
